blur_detection.description: The text is sharp and clearly defined with no visible blur.

contrast_assessment.description: Excellent contrast between text and background, ensuring clear text recognition.

glare_identification.description: No glare or bright spots detected that obscure text or important document areas.

water_stains.description: No water stains or discolorations affecting document readability.

tears_or_folds.description: No visible tears, creases, folds, or wrinkles that distort text or cause information loss.

cut_off_detection.description: No document edges are cut off, and the image frame includes all important portions.

missing_sections.description: No parts of the receipt/invoice are missing or incomplete.

obstructions.description: No objects, fingers, shadows, or other elements block or obscure document content.

classification.reasoning: The document contains multiple fields that align with the expense schema, including supplier, consumerRecipient, transactionAmount, transactionDate, itemDescriptionLineItems, and paymentMethod. It represents a completed payment for a ride service, thus classified as a travel expense.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: The document contains 6 out of 8 required fields, indicating it is an expense document. The fields present include supplier (Grab), consumerRecipient (Natalie), transactionAmount (RM 79.00), transactionDate (21 April 2025), itemDescriptionLineItems (Fare, Toll), and paymentMethod (Paid by Natalie 4906).

issues.description: The receipt does not include the employee name as the traveler, which is mandatory for flight expenses.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Flight ticket should be supported with itinerary with the employee's name, or the invoice issued by travel agency in the name of employer.

issues.field: ICP company name as billed party
issues.description: The receipt does not include the ICP company name as the billed party, which is optional but recommended for non-travel expenses.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Invoice in the name of the Employer (wherever possible) - the name of the employer is the name of local entity of GoGlobal that employs the worker.

issues.description: The tax amount is present, but the tax rate is not specified. This may lead to tax implications as per local regulations.
issues.recommendation: Ensure that the tax rate is clearly specified on the receipt to avoid any tax implications.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: All approved expenses will be paid as NET to the employee and grossed up if they are not tax-free. Expenses that fall under taxable income will be treated as per the local regulations.

issues.description: Additional documentation is required to establish the clear business purpose of the incurred expense and to convert the amount in local currency for foreign currency expenses.
issues.recommendation: Submit expense claims with clear and legible copies of the receipts to Client line manager for approval preferably within the same month of the expense. Convert amount in local currency and include currency & exchange rate used for foreign currency expenses.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Establish clear business purpose of all incurred expenses. Convert amount in local currency and include currency & exchange rate used for foreign currency expenses.

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt has several compliance issues that need to be addressed. Mandatory fields such as the employee name as the traveler and the ICP company name as the billed party are missing. Additionally, the tax rate is not specified, which may lead to tax implications. Further documentation is required to establish the clear business purpose of the expense and to convert the amount in local currency for foreign currency expenses.
